channel.title: JMX on The Place
channel.description: Recent content in JMX on The Place

item.title: Testing some FrameWorks and applications on Glassfish build 40+ part IV
item.description: This time i want to setup and test a utility that i am using with my Application server to mange them and monitor them. Utility that i will use is Mc4j A very powerful and flexible jmx console built on top of Netbeans Platform . so to follow this blog entry you will need GlassFish build 40+ , although i am testing it on buid 42 .Also you will need to have Mc4j version 1.
